content.text:
Now I have a clear 3D view of the molecule with all atom labels visible. Let me focus specifically on atom C:15 (carbon with index 15) to identify its neighbor atoms.

Looking at the image, I can see atom C:15 is labeled in the structure. From this view, I can clearly identify the atoms directly bonded to C:15:

- C:14 (carbon with index 14) - connected via a bond
- C:7 (carbon with index 7) - connected via a bond  
- H:29 (hydrogen with index 29) - connected via a bond

Let me verify these connections by examining the spatial arrangement. Atom C:15 appears to be part of a ring structure and has exactly three covalent bonds visible in this 3D representation.

The geomconf_index can be determined from the file name "geomconf_2434.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 2434.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 15 (C) are:
- Atom index 14, element C
- Atom index 7, element C
- Atom index 29, element H

And the geomconf_index for this molecule is 2434.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
